issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
curl used to download docker-compose.yml without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Self-host Windmill and write an auto-UI script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the documented docker compose flow from the windmill-labs repo and wrote a typed TypeScript main() that auto-generates a UI from function parameters; baseline built a custom Express app instead of leveraging Windmill's auto-UI.

scenarios.name: Internal admin tool with workflow + UI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chained typed Python/TypeScript scripts with branching as documented and pointed to Windmill's drag-and-drop app builder backed by scripts; baseline proposed Retool or a hand-rolled React dashboard that misses Windmill's code-first model.
